top_signals.title: Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
top_signals.summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pointed News Quiz | Reddit, Music, YA Novels
top_signals.summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: LGBTQ+ families are building lives Japanese lawmakers still struggle to see
top_signals.summary: Japan does not offer same-sex couples the same legal rights and benefits granted to married couples.
